## [00:00 - 01:15]

Mmm, mmm, yeah, increase your water intake, okay? Look, I know people that keep a gallon of this with them. Some of the highest, most producing people I know, literally early in their career, I know a guy named Chris used to walk around with a gallon of water everywhere he went, constantly consuming water, constantly just lubricating his body. I'm like, oh my God, that's brilliant. See, the problem with me in water is this, I never have enough water around me. So I go for whatever's quick. Water is good for you, okay? Most of your body is made up of water. The more saturated you can stay with water, okay? The more energy you're gonna actually have, the more real, long energy you're gonna have. Increase your water intake, it can't hurt you. You know it's gonna help you. It's gonna keep your body working. It's gonna keep you loose. And it's gonna give you confidence. Probably the most important thing, it's gonna give you the confidence that you're in charge of your intake. That's what I'm telling you, man. Watch what you eat, watch the sugars, and increase the water intake because it's gonna give you some confidence. Look, if I can't control my body, how am I gonna control my motivation? You get it? If I can't control what I'm gonna put in my body, in my fuel tank, how can I control how motivated, excited, and inspired I'm gonna be?
